query:
-- SBSP3: planilha QTD=3585, PM=14.113 + 100 @ 29.16 = QTD 3685, PM 14.521
UPDATE assets SET
  totalQuantity = '3685.00000000',
  averageCost   = '14.52133000',
  totalCost     = '53511.10'
WHERE ticker = 'SBSP3';

-- TTEN3: planilha QTD=2675, PM=11.296 + 60 @ 16.78 = QTD 2735, PM 11.416
UPDATE assets SET
  totalQuantity = '2735.00000000',
  averageCost   = '11.41631000',
  totalCost     = '31223.60'
WHERE ticker = 'TTEN3';

-- PLTR: planilha QTD=4.98448, PM=136.801 + 0.53991@133.33 + 1.50965@138.76 = QTD 7.03404, PM 136.955
UPDATE assets SET
  totalQuantity = '7.03404000',
  averageCost   = '136.95502000',
  totalCost     = '963.08'
WHERE ticker = 'PLTR';

-- LMT: planilha QTD=2.16067, PM=515.95 + 0.23014@521.33 + 0.51933@521.54 = QTD 2.91014, PM 517.373
UPDATE assets SET
  totalQuantity = '2.91014000',
  averageCost   = '517.37303000',
  totalCost     = '1505.64'
WHERE ticker = 'LMT';

-- URNM: planilha QTD=114.7437, PM=58.948 + 2.54626@58.87 = QTD 117.28996, PM 58.946
UPDATE assets SET
  totalQuantity = '117.28996000',
  averageCost   = '58.94631000',
  totalCost     = '6913.99'
WHERE ticker = 'URNM';

-- INDA ETF: planilha QTD=13.95013, PM=52.043 + 4.12371@48.50 = QTD 18.07384, PM 51.165
UPDATE assets SET
  totalQuantity = '18.07384000',
  averageCost   = '51.16500000',
  totalCost     = '925.20'
WHERE ticker = 'INDA';
